chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ الْحَجِّ وَ الْعُمْرَةِ وَ ثَوَابِهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – Merits of the Hajj and the Umra, and their Rewards

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/130)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/130)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَنْ دُفِنَ فِي الْحَرَمِ أَمِنَ مِنَ الْفَزَعِ الْأَكْبَرِ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ مِنْ بَرِّ النَّاسِ وَ فَاجِرِهِمْ قَالَ مِنْ بَرِّ النَّاسِ وَ فَاجِرِهِمْ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Abu Ismail Al sarraj, from Haroun Bin Kharja who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The one who is buried in the Al-Harram would be secure from the great panic’. So I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘From the righteous of the people and their immoral ones (as well)?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘From the righteous of the people and their immoral ones (as well)’.
en.sarwar: 26. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Muhammad ibn Isma‘il from abu Isma‘il al-Sarraj from Harun ibn Kharijah who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘One who is buried in al-Haram is immune from the great terrifying event.’ I (the narrator) asked him, ’Does it apply to both people of good and evil deeds?’ He (the Imam) replied, ’Yes, it applies to both kinds of people.’”
